title: The Day Earth Stopped
description: The world ended quietly. You didn’t. Scavenge, build and survive in a decaying Earth overrun by hordes of zombies that never rest. Fight. Fortify. Endure.
body:
![Official Banner The Day Earth Stopped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03315d6d73029e50e9d55031d540ae1c49a4799a.png) # 🧟‍♂️ THE DAY EARTH STOPPED ### **by Reiginblast - sponsored by ERAZER** ✔️ Full parity with [Curseforge](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/the-day-earth-stopped) **The Day Earth Stopped** is a **post-apocalyptic survival modpack for Forge 1.20.1**, designed to transform Minecraft into a long-term, realistic, and performance-optimized survival experience. It combines **urban decay, dynamic weather, realistic survival systems**, and **advanced combat mechanics** to create a consistent world where danger exists everywhere, day and night. The modpack has been curated for both **single-player immersion** and **cinematic storytelling**, with special attention to performance balance and atmosphere. It has been optimized for **ERAZER Gaming hardware** for stable FPS even in large cities and storm environments. **Feedback on comment section** are welcome and much appreciated! --- ## 🌍 A Dead World That Still Breathes > The Earth has been reclaimed by rot and rust. Entire cities lie in ruins, taken back by vegetation and silence. - **ChaosZPack [Lost Cities] + William Wythers’ Expanded Ecosphere** recreate a world torn between urban collapse and overgrown wilderness. - **Immersive Weathering** slowly corrodes your surroundings; **Weather Storms & Tornadoes** rip through the horizon, changing the terrain forever. - **True Darkness** and **DayZombies Rebooted** make daylight no longer safe, zombies now hunt under any sun. - **Ambient Sounds**, **Sound Physics Remastered**, and the **CoD Zombies Sound Pack** merge into a soundscape where even silence is dangerous. Each step echoes in the empty streets. Each night lasts longer than it should. --- ## 🩸 Survival Beyond the Hunger Bar > You are not immortal anymore. - **Legendary Survival Overhaul:** replaces Minecraft’s health bar with a body-part system (head, arms, legs, torso). Injuries cause bleeding, limping, or reduced strength. - **Mediumcore:** each death permanently removes one heart, increasing the tension of long-term survival. - **Sona:** infection system disabled by default, but other features (noise, threat levels) remain active. - **Cold, heat, and thirst** are real dangers: exhaustion and dehydration build over time. - **Zombie Awareness**, **The Hordes**, and **Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time** evolve the enemy AI. Smell, light, and sound matter. You must craft/savage **bandages, painkillers, and proper food sources** to remain effective. Surviving without preparation quickly becomes impossible. --- ## 🧟 Enemies and AI Zombies are the main threat: faster, louder, and smarter than ever. - **Zombie Awareness:** zombies detect players through sound, smell, and light sources. - **The Hordes:** organized group spawns with customizable density and timing. - **Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time:** global difficulty increases the longer you survive. - **llpsw Zombie & Zombies Revamped:** adds events of zombie variants with different behaviors and textures. - **BadMobs:** removes neutral and passive mobs (except cows and sheep) to focus entirely on the undead ecosystem. --- ## 🔫 Weapons of the New World Civilization left its tools behind. Now, they’re yours. - **TACZ (Timeless and Classics Zero)** and **Extinction Z** bring an arsenal of modern firearms: pistols, rifles, shotguns, and explosives. - **TACZ Turrets** allow you to drop automated defenses. Simply throw a weapon onto a turret and it will guard your base. - **Vic’s Point Blank** and **Third Person Shooting: Zero** transform combat into a tactical, cinematic experience. - **MineTraps**, **Zombie Survival Kit**, and **Doomsday Decoration** add bear traps, spike pits, barbed wire, toxic gas, barricades, and razor fences. Every bullet counts. Every barricade buys you seconds. --- ## 🧱 Progression Structure The progression curve in **The Day Earth Stopped** is designed around phases of survival: 1. Begin with no tools. Search abandoned buildings for food, medicine, and scrap materials. Avoid combat and focus on mobility. 2. Craft basic weapons, campfire, and shelter. Hunt small loot caches, craft steel (via CraftTweaker recipe), and explore city limits. 3. Establish a fixed base. Reinforce doors and walls using **Immersive Weathering** materials. Install traps and basic turrets. 4. Gather **Sky’s Overworld Quartz and Netherite** to craft advanced armor, Exoskeleton equipment, and heavy weaponry. 5. Maintain your bunker. Defend against hordes. Automate defenses with turrets, barricades, and ammunition storage. Survive as long as possible. --- ## 🧩 Performance and Stability Despite its size, **The Day Earth Stopped** is engineered to run efficiently thanks to: - **Embeddium + Oculus + Distant Horizons + Noisium** → optimized rendering and extended world visibility. - **ModernFix + FerriteCore + Memory Leak Fix + GPUBooster + Entity Culling + Saturn** → full optimization stack for FPS stability. - **AppleSkin + Inventory Profiles Next + Better Zoom + JEI + Patchouli** → accessibility without breaking immersion. 📈 Designed on **ERAZER Gamma** laptops and desktops, ensuring smooth performance at ultra settings. Experience the apocalypse at **90+ FPS**, powered by **ERAZER hardware**. --- ## 🎮 Recommended Settings - **Shaders:** Photon (included), configured for cinematic lighting and low saturation. - **Difficulty:** Medium (default). - **Game Mode:** Mediumcore (enabled by default). - **Structure Generation:** Lost Cities with ChaosZPack (enabled by default). - **Resource Packs:** Stay True + Zombies Revamped. --- ## 💻 System Requirements | Setting | Minimum | Recommended (ERAZER) | |----------|----------|----------------------| | CPU | i5 9600K / Ryzen 5 3600 | i7 13700H / Ryzen 9 | | GPU | GTX 1060 | RTX 4070 | | RAM | 16 GB | 32 GB | | Storage | SSD | NVMe SSD | ![Erazer Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8448fd166e7b73862c21b8bfcb28e92190712414_0.webp) --- ## 🧟‍♀️ Key Mods - ✔️ **Gameplay:** The Hordes, Zombie Awareness, Mediumcore, Legendary Survival Overhaul - ✔️ **World:** Lost Cities, ChaosZPack, Keerdm Zombie Essential, William Wythers - ✔️ **Weapons:** TACZ, Extinction Z, Vic’s Point Blank - ✔️ **Atmosphere:** True Darkness, Immersive Weathering, Ambient Sounds - ✔️ **Optimization:** Embeddium, Oculus, ModernFix - ✔️ **Survival:** Zombie Survival Kit, Camping, MineTraps - ✔️ **UI / HUD:** Apocalypse HUD, AppleSkin, MobHealthBar --- ## 🎯 Key Features at a Glance - Over **90 curated mods** for a unified apocalypse experience - Procedural **abandoned cities** with realistic decay - Smarter **zombies and horde mechanics** - Realistic **damage and body health system** - Modular **firearms and automatic turrets** - **Tornadoes, storms, and erosion** systems - Full **performance stack** (Embeddium + Oculus + ModernFix) - Advanced **3D sound and lighting** - Realistic **base building and fortification** - Progressive **difficulty and long-term survival** --- ## ⚠️ Important Notes - The **Nether** and **End** dimensions are disabled (replaced with overworld variants of Netherite/Quartz). - Set **"Enable Distant Generation"** to **OFF** with **Distant Horizons**; using this setting may causes errors with **Lost Cities**. ## 📦 Included Content
🧩 Mods **Modrinth** - ChaosZPack [Lost Cities] Abandoned / Zombie Apocalypse - The Hordes - TACZ Turrets - Extinction Z - True Darkness [Forge] - Updated Fork - Weather Storms & Tornadoes - Immersive Weathering - William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere - Sona Survival 101 - Legendary Survival Overhaul - Mediumcore - Zombie Awareness - llpsw Zombie - Keerdm Zombie Apocalypse Essentials - Hostile Mobs Improve Over Time - Vic’s Point Blank - Third Person Shooting: Zero - MineTraps - Zombie Survival Kit - Doomsday Decoration - [Let's Do] Camping - TorchMaster - Dynamic Lights - AmbientSounds - BadMobs - AppleSkin - MobHealthBar - Better Combat - Extragore - Loot Cities - TaC:Z and VPB Loot tables **Optimization** - Embeddium - Oculus - ModernFix - FerriteCore - Noisium - GPUBooster - Entity Culling - Saturn - Memory Leak Fix - ImmediatelyFast - Distant Horizons - FastBoot - Cloth Config API - Kotlin for Forge - Blueprint - libIPN - Puzzles Lib - Atlas Lib - Moonlight Lib - Cristel Lib - CreativeCore - framework-forge **Performance Utilities** - Inventory Profiles Next - Better Zoom - Patchouli - JEI (Just Enough Items) - AppleSkin - MobHealthBar
🎨 Resource Packs - Stay True - Zombies Revamped - Glowing Emissive Ores - Stay True - Doomsday Decoration in English - CoD Zombies Sound Pack - Apocalypse HUD
🌅 Shaders - Photon (preconfigured) - Compatible with Oculus - Cinematic lighting + low saturation color tone
## **📜 Credits & Licensing** - All included mods and assets are the property of their respective authors. - The Day Earth Stopped is a curated compilation that reconfigures and balances existing mods for a unified survival experience. - All credit and authorship remain with the original mod creators. Some files (like Keerdm Zombie Essentials) are used with explicit permission from their authors, as stated on their official mod pages. ## **Links of attribution requirements** https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horror-elements-mod https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true
